headline: How Eli Lilly is unlocking the next level for weight-loss drugs
summary: Eli Lilly (LLY) delivered impressive late-stage trial results for its newest weight-loss drug. UBS Global head of biotech research Michael Yee explains what this means for Novo Nordisk (NVO) and the future of the industry.

headline: Novo Nordisk Weighs AI Push And Wegovy Pill Rollout Against Valuation
summary: Novo Nordisk (NYSE:NVO) has entered a partnership with OpenAI to apply artificial intelligence across drug discovery, manufacturing, and supply chain operations. The company is preparing a global rollout of the oral Wegovy weight loss pill after its US launch. Recent trial data for semaglutide and pipeline drugs such as Amycretin and CagriSema indicate further progress in obesity and metabolic disease treatments. Novo Nordisk is drawing fresh attention as it pairs an AI push with a growing...

headline: Novo Nordisk faces new GLP-1 rival as Eli Lilly's triple agonist sets weight-loss record
summary: Citi said Eli Lilly and Co's (NYSE:LLY) experimental obesity drug retatrutide has set a new competitive benchmark for the GLP-1 weight-loss market after a pivotal trial showed patients losing 28% of their body weight over 80 weeks at the highest dose.
